Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.test

Class TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.test.TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit
  • public class TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit
extends java.lang.Object
    TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit class contains the test cases related to search and suggest of SNOMED CT.
